label: Starting animal
description: Adds one or more tamed animals to the starting party, optionally bonded to a random colonist.

animalKind.label: Animal kind
animalKind.description: PawnKindDef for the animal to add. Leave absent to allow any animal.

count.label: Count
count.description: Number of animals to add. Defaults to 1.

bondToRandomPlayerPawnChance.label: Bond to random player pawn chance
bondToRandomPlayerPawnChance.description: Probability (0-1) that each animal is bonded to a randomly chosen starting colonist. Defaults to 0.5.
